title: CubEmi
description: A joke mod made for a Vtuber with very silly stuff
body: # CubEmi [](https://github.com/claymorwan/CubEmi) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubemi) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cubemi) [](https://fabricmc.net/) A joke mod made for a friend Vtuber with very silly stuff :3 ![icon](https://github.com/claymorwan/CubEmi/assets/86072589/a7b59410-c6be-4945-9915-270d12f3dd3e) # 📦 Content As for now, the mod include just a simple block, whatever this is ![The almighty Emi block](https://i.imgur.com/YDgyXak.png) # ⬇️ Future addition - New tools, materials, armors - A new dimension - New entities - Even more when I get ideas
